Bash(powershell.exe -Command "docker exec stratekaz_backend python manage.py shell -c ''
from django.db import connection
from django_tenants.utils import get_tenant_model

for tenant in get_tenant_model\(\).objects.exclude\(schema_name=""public""\):
    connection.set_tenant\(tenant\)
    from apps.core.models import TabSection
    
    # Fix normas-iso
    updated_normas = TabSection.objects.filter\(code=""normas-iso""\).update\(code=""normas_iso""\)
    print\(f""{tenant.schema_name}: normas-iso -> normas_iso: {updated_normas} updated""\)
    
    # Fix ejecucion-monitoreo
    updated_ejecucion = TabSection.objects.filter\(code=""ejecucion-monitoreo""\).update\(code=""ejecucion_monitoreo""\)
    print\(f""{tenant.schema_name}: ejecucion-monitoreo -> ejecucion_monitoreo: {updated_ejecucion} updated""\)
    
    # Verify
    sections = TabSection.objects.filter\(code__in=[""normas_iso"", ""ejecucion_monitoreo""]\).values_list\(""code"", flat=True\)
    print\(f""{tenant.schema_name}: verified codes = {list\(sections\)}""\)
    print\(\)
''")
